sentences.en: I like it because it's easy.
How do I tell him no?
I think it's too expensive.
I feel bad because I didn't sleep.
I'm calm, everything's fine.
I speak Spanish better than before.
It's not worth what it costs.
Excuse me, how do I get to the hotel?
You need to drink more water.
You have to try again.
You should ask if you don't understand.
I've been waiting for an hour.
I have to do the shopping.
I think it's going to rain.
They say it's going to rain.
Wait, it's not this way.
Let's meet at eight, okay?
I love when it's free.
I'm tired because I worked a lot.
We're tired because we walked a lot.
How old do you think I am?
I'm right this time, trust me.
I love it when you speak Spanish.
You have to eat to live.
I can learn this if I practice.
We're a little late, sorry.
How much did he tell you it cost?
What do you want me to say?
She asked me if I knew you.
Bring me a water, please.
Run, the bus is coming.
I think we ate too much yesterday.
We can make it if we keep trying.
I don't eat much when I'm working.
I can't, I have to work.
I get up, eat, and work.
I want coffee, but I'd rather sleep.
If it's cheap, I'll buy it.
If you like it, we'll order more.
I want to buy it, but not right now.
When I have money, I'll buy it.
When I was a kid, I ate a lot.

sentences.t: Quiero un poco más de tiempo.
sentences.en: I want a little more time.

sentences.t: No sé de dónde es él.
sentences.en: I don't know where he's from.

sentences.t: Él no hace nada en casa.
sentences.en: He doesn't do anything at home.

sentences.t: Mañana vamos a salir a comer.
sentences.en: Tomorrow we're going out to eat.

sentences.t: A ella le gusta el café.
sentences.en: She likes coffee.

sentences.t: A él le gusta dormir mucho.
sentences.en: He likes to sleep a lot.

sentences.t: No sé quién se lo dijo.
sentences.en: I don't know who told her.
Are you from here or not?

sentences.t: La comida está en la cocina.
sentences.en: The food's in the kitchen.
Why are you in my room?

sentences.t: Hoy me siento un poco mal.
sentences.en: Today I feel a little off.

sentences.t: Sé hablar un poco de español.
sentences.en: I know how to speak a little Spanish.

sentences.t: Voy a pedir lo de siempre.
sentences.en: I'm going to order my usual.
And what are you going to order?

sentences.t: Ayer fui al trabajo en bus.
sentences.en: Yesterday I went to work by bus.

sentences.t: Fui a comer con mi amigo.
sentences.en: I went to eat with my friend.
Are you Ana's friend?

sentences.t: Por la noche estoy muy cansado.
sentences.en: At night I'm really tired.

sentences.t: No tengo ganas de trabajar hoy.
sentences.en: I don't feel like working today.

sentences.t: Aquí el café es muy caro.
sentences.en: The coffee here is really expensive.

sentences.t: Hace mucho calor en la cocina.
sentences.en: It's really hot in the kitchen.

sentences.t: Tengo calor y me siento mal.
sentences.en: I'm hot and I feel bad.

sentences.t: La comida está sobre la mesa.
sentences.en: The food's on the table.

sentences.t: Tu teléfono está sobre la cama.
sentences.en: Your phone is on the bed.

sentences.t: No quiero pagar yo otra vez.
sentences.en: I don't want to pay again.

sentences.t: Te llamo mañana por la mañana.
sentences.en: I'll call you tomorrow morning.

sentences.t: Este fin de semana no puedo.
sentences.en: I can't this weekend.

sentences.t: El perro está en la cocina.
sentences.en: The dog is in the kitchen.
What time does the train arrive?

sentences.t: Ahora vivo cerca de mi trabajo.
sentences.en: Now I live close to work.
Why does your head hurt?

sentences.t: Me duele la cabeza desde ayer.
sentences.en: My head has hurt since yesterday.

sentences.t: Voy a volver en un momento.
sentences.en: I'll be back in a moment.

sentences.t: Nos encanta la comida de aquí.
sentences.en: We love the food here.

sentences.t: No me gusta esperar mucho tiempo.
sentences.en: I don't like waiting a long time.

sentences.t: Vengo a casa solo para dormir.
sentences.en: I only come home to sleep.

sentences.t: Vuelvo el lunes por la mañana.
sentences.en: I'll be back Monday morning.

sentences.t: Yo pago la cuenta esta vez.
sentences.en: I'll pay the check this time.

sentences.t: Sigue y gira a la derecha.
sentences.en: Keep going and turn right.
Do I walk or take the bus?

sentences.t: El centro está lejos a pie.
sentences.en: Downtown is far on foot.

sentences.t: El gato está en mi cuarto.
sentences.en: The cat's in my room.

sentences.t: No vivo lejos de la ciudad.
sentences.en: I don't live far from the city.
Why didn't you tell me anything?

sentences.t: Encontré mi teléfono debajo del sofá.
sentences.en: I found my phone under the couch.

sentences.t: La estación está cerca de aquí.
sentences.en: The station is near here.

sentences.t: Voy a casa de mi mamá.
sentences.en: I'm going to my mom's place.

sentences.t: Mi mamá está en la cocina.
sentences.en: My mom's in the kitchen.

sentences.t: A mi mamá le encanta cocinar.
sentences.en: My mom loves cooking.

sentences.t: Salgo del trabajo a las cinco.
sentences.en: I get off work at five.

sentences.t: El libro está sobre la mesa.
sentences.en: The book is on the table.

sentences.t: Mis llaves están debajo del libro.
sentences.en: My keys are under the book.
